setup.content:
1. Choose a **dealer**. Shuffle the 112-card double-sided deck with the **Light Side** facing up.
2. Deal **7 cards** to each player, Light Side up.
3. Place the remaining deck in the center as the **draw pile**.
4. Flip the top card to start the **discard pile**. If it's an action card, follow its effect.

All cards are **double-sided** — each has a Light Side and a Dark Side. The game always starts on the Light Side.

light-side.content:
When the **Light Side** is active, on your turn play a card matching the top discard by **color**, **number**, or **symbol**.

**Can't play?** Draw 1 card. You may play it immediately if it matches.

**UNO rule:** When playing your second-to-last card, call **"UNO!"** before your next turn. If caught, draw **2 penalty cards**.

Light Side cards are gentler — similar to classic UNO.

dark-side.content:
When the **Dark Side** is active, play by the same matching rules — **color**, **number**, or **symbol** — but using the Dark Side of your cards.

**Can't play?** Draw 1 card. Play it immediately if it matches.

The Dark Side has harsher action cards: Draw Five, Skip Everyone, and Wild Draw Color. Watch out!

**UNO rule:** Same as Light Side — call **"UNO!"** on your second-to-last card or draw 2 penalty cards.

flip-card.content:
The **Flip** card switches the entire game between sides.

**When played:**
- All players flip their **hands** to the other side
- The **draw pile** and **discard pile** are flipped
- The game continues on the new active side

- Light Side **Flip** → switches to **Dark Side**
- Dark Side **Flip** → switches back to **Light Side**

Every card in play changes sides instantly — check your new hand carefully!

light-actions.content:
| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Draw One** | Next player draws 1 card and skips their turn |
| **Reverse** | Reverses direction of play |
| **Skip** | Next player loses their turn |
| **Flip** | Everyone flips hands and piles to the **Dark Side** |
| **Wild** | Choose the next color |
| **Wild Draw Two** | Choose color; next player draws 2 and loses turn |

dark-actions.content:
| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Draw Five** | Next player draws 5 cards and skips their turn |
| **Reverse** | Reverses direction of play |
| **Skip Everyone** | All other players lose their turn |
| **Flip** | Everyone flips hands and piles to the **Light Side** |
| **Wild** | Choose the next color |
| **Wild Draw Color** | Next player draws until they get the chosen color, then loses turn |

winning.content:
First player to **empty their hand** wins the round.

Score points from opponents' remaining cards (both sides use the same values):

| Card Type | Points |
|-----------|--------|
| Number cards | Face value |
| Draw One / Draw Five | 10 |
| Reverse / Skip / Skip Everyone / Flip | 20 |
| Wild | 40 |
| Wild Draw Two / Wild Draw Color | 50 |

First to **500 points** wins the game.
